             +---------------+
             |  API Gateway  |
             +-------+-------+
                     |
+---------[  Service Layer  ]----------+
|                    |                 |
|                    v                 |
|           +----------------+         |
|           |  User Service  |         |
|           +--------+-------+         |
|                    |                 |
|          +---------+---------+       |
|          |                   |       |
|          |                   |       |
| +----------[  Data Layer  ]----------+
| |        |                   |       |
| |        v                   v       |
| +-----------------+    /-----------\ |
| |  Order Service  |    |  User DB  | |
| +--------+--------+    \-----+-----/ |
| |        |                   |       |
| |        |                   |       |
| |        |                   |       |
| |        v-------------------+       |
| | /------------\             |       |
| | |  Order DB  |             |       |
| | \------+-----/             |       |
| |        |                   |       |
| |        +---------+---------+       |
| |                  |                 |
| +------------------+-----------------+
+--------------------|-----------------+
                     v
          +--------------------+
          |  Response Builder  |
          +--------------------+
